### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED

Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Data models for flows, transactions, and summary.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n__all__ = [\"Flow\", \"Transaction\", \"Summary\"]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "a7ba446e131cbd5340745234604c66e52de1888d1e39c814d00e0cb7af52e2be",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Transaction model: one HTTP/gRPC request-response or stream.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Transaction(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"One application-layer transaction (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2 stream, or gRPC call).\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    txn_id: str\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    protocol: str = Field(description=\"http1 | http2 | grpc\")\r\n    method: str | None = None\r\n    authority: str | None = None  # Host for HTTP/1.1, :authority for HTTP/2\r\n    path: str | None = None\r\n    status_code: int | None = None\r\n    stream_id: int | None = None\r\n    request_ts: float | None = None\r\n    response_ts: float | None = None\r\n    end_ts: float | None = None\r\n    latency_ms: float | None = Field(default=None, description=\"response_ts - request_ts in ms\")\r\n    request_bytes: int = 0\r\n    response_bytes: int = 0\r\n    grpc_service: str | None = None\r\n    grpc_method: str | None = None\r\n    message_sizes: list[int] | None = None  # gRPC message lengths from framing\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "490abfc2e87e427449014b2adee50db2d96a854aadf609da89f8746c63d81b30",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Summary statistics model for summary.json.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TopTalker(BaseModel):\r\n    ip: str\r\n    bytes_sent: int = 0\r\n    bytes_recv: int = 0\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TopDestination(BaseModel):\r\n    target: str  # \"ip:port\" or hostname when known\r\n    bytes_sent: int = 0\r\n    flow_count: int = 0\r\n\r\n\r\nclass LatencyPercentiles(BaseModel):\r\n    p50_ms: float | None = None\r\n    p90_ms: float | None = None\r\n    p99_ms: float | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Summary(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"Aggregate stats written to summary.json.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    total_flows: int = 0\r\n    total_bytes: int = 0\r\n    total_transactions: int = 0\r\n    top_talkers: list[TopTalker] = Field(default_factory=list)\r\n    top_destinations: list[TopDestination] = Field(default_factory=list)\r\n    top_ports: list[dict[str, int | str]] = Field(\r\n        default_factory=list,\r\n        description=\"List of {port, count} or {port, bytes}\",\r\n    )\r\n    active_flow_peaks: int = 0  # max concurrent flows in any bucket\r\n    latency_percentiles: LatencyPercentiles = Field(default_factory=LatencyPercentiles)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "91a43f72a20a0b810258d3051f80b150ae5decc70ff10d51567ab5f21a3a38a5",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Application-layer protocol handlers.\"\"\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "2c3ba8501cd29067752d9501ad6a9e216ad534371d9c72ab2eef5678fce6976c",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Flow model: one TCP flow keyed by 5-tuple.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Flow(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"A single TCP flow with timing, byte counts, and optional RTT/concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    capture_file_id: str\r\n    src_ip: str\r\n    src_port: int\r\n    dst_ip: str\r\n    dst_port: int\r\n    protocol: int = 6  # TCP\r\n    # Initiator = side that sent first SYN (client)\r\n    client_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the initiator (client)\")\r\n    client_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the initiator\")\r\n    server_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the responder (server)\")\r\n    server_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the responder\")\r\n    start_ts: float = Field(description=\"First packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    end_ts: float = Field(description=\"Last packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    duration_sec: float = Field(description=\"end_ts - start_ts\")\r\n    bytes_client_to_server: int = 0\r\n    bytes_server_to_client: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_s2c: int = 0\r\n    estimated_rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None = Field(\r\n        default=None,\r\n        description=\"(bucket_start_ts, active_flow_count) per bucket\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "31f811cbbe822571931279fb3c5745044530e0b0d572b41ff1e53b7f70adce98",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Packet and flow parsers.\"\"\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "08ccf66c14eaeb4d1d3ea405ac335fbb3a7920c72411134a33764d015d66edb2",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int]\r\n# (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        payload = bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\"\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            payload,\r\n            tcp.seq,\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq).\"\"\"\r\n    reader, fh = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            _, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq)\r\n    finally:\r\n        fh.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "0ea38ef6d651018316c168f5ef56cbdca6c2d85a31848bc74f80db32e906077f",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:02:29 GMT
Vary: Origin

transactions, and summary.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n__all__ =  protocol: str = Field(description=\"http1 | http2 | grpc\")\r\n    method: str | None = None\r\n    authority: str | None = None  # Host for HTTP/1.1, :authority for HTTP/2\r\n    path: str | None =  grpc_method: str | None = None\r\n    message_sizes: list[int] | None = None  # gRPC message lengths from framing\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "490abfc2e87e427449014b2adee50db2d96a854aadf609da89f8746c63d81b30", summary.json.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass TopTalker(BaseModel):\r\n    ip: str\r\n    bytes_sent: int = 0\r\n    bytes_recv: int = 0\r\n\r\n\r\nclass float | None = None\r\n    p90_ms: float | None = None\r\n    p99_ms: float | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Summary(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"Aggregate stats written to summary.json.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    total_flows: int = 0\r\n    total_bytes: int = 0\r\n    total_transactions: int = 0\r\n    top_talkers: list[TopTalker] = Field(default_factory=list)\r\n    top_destinations: list[TopDestination] = Field(default_factory=list)\r\n    top_ports: list[dict[str, int | str]] = Field(\r\n        default_factory=list,\r\n        description=\"List of {port, count} or {port, bytes}\",\r\n    )\r\n [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Flow model: one TCP flow keyed by 5-tuple.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Flow(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"A single TCP flow with timing, byte counts, and optional RTT/concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    capture_file_id: str\r\n    src_ip: str\r\n    src_port: int\r\n    dst_ip: str\r\n    dst_port: int\r\n    protocol: int = 6  # TCP\r\n    # Initiator = side that sent first SYN (client)\r\n    client_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the initiator (client)\")\r\n    client_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the initiator\")\r\n    server_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the responder (server)\")\r\n    server_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the responder\")\r\n    start_ts: float = Field(description=\"First packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    end_ts: float = Field(description=\"Last packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    duration_sec: float = Field(description=\"end_ts - start_ts\")\r\n    bytes_client_to_server: int = 0\r\n    bytes_server_to_client: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_s2c: int = 0\r\n    estimated_rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None = Field(\r\n        default=None,\r\n        description=\"(bucket_start_ts, active_flow_count) per bucket\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "31f811cbbe822571931279fb3c5745044530e0b0d572b41ff1e53b7f70adce98", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Packet and flow parsers.\"\"\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "08ccf66c14eaeb4d1d3ea405ac335fbb3a7920c72411134a33764d015d66edb2", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int]\r\n# (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        payload = bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\"\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            payload,\r\n            tcp.seq,\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq).\"\"\"\r\n    reader, fh = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            _, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq)\r\n    finally:\r\n        fh.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "0ea38ef6d651018316c168f5ef56cbdca6c2d85a31848bc74f80db32e906077f", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```
